audit_items.proof_trace: Self-peer bypass at L37-38 accepts own messages without any REJECT checks. Local validator's data columns skip all 12 gossip requirements (field validity, KZG proofs, proposer signature, inclusion proofs, etc.) and return ValidationAccept immediately.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Compromised local validator or malicious modification of validator client can broadcast invalid data columns (wrong KZG proofs, invalid signatures, incorrect subnets) which are auto-accepted by own node, bypassing all consensus validation. These invalid sidecars propagate to forkchoice/storage before detection.
